G, title I, § 105125 Stat. 1123Dec. 23, 2011“Effective —February 1, 2010“(1)section 905 of the Emergency Supplemental Act, 2002 () is repealed; and2 U.S.C. 130i“(2)the functions and responsibilities of the Office of Emergency Planning, Preparedness and Operations under section 905 of such Act are transferred and assigned to the Sergeant at Arms of the House of Representatives.”
